title: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple
tagline: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Vazhappally near Changanassery in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Vazhappally near Changanassery in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is administered by the Travancore Devaswom Board. The temple is believed to be constructed by the first Chera king of Kodungallur. The legends suggest that the installation of the idol of god Mahadeva (Shiva) was performed by Parasurama himself.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vazhappally
topPlaces.description: Vazhappally is a suburb of Changanasserry Municipality, Kottayam District, in central Kerala. The famous Vazhappally Shiva Temple is situated in Vazhappally.

topPlaces.name: Archeparchy of Changanacherry
topPlaces.description: The Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanacherry (Syriac: ܐܦܪܟܝܐ ܪܒܬܐ ܕܫܢܓܢܐܣܐܪܐ, romanized: Afarkaya Rabbta d-Shanganasara; Malayalam: ചങ്ങനാശ്ശേരി അതിരൂപത, romanized: Changanassery Atirūpata) is a Syro-Malabar Church archeparchy of the Catholic Church with an area of 24,595 km2 comprising the districts of Kottayam(excluding Vaikom), Alappuzha(excluding Cherthala), Pathanamthitta, Kollam, and Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, and also Kanyakumari district in Tamil Nadu. It is one of the largest Catholic dioceses in India in terms of area.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, Changanassery
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, also known as Valiyapally, is the cathedral of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanassery (Archieparchia Changanacherrensis) and also a Marian pilgrimage centre in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Holy Family Syro-Malabar Church, Mannila
topPlaces.description: Holy Family Church Mannila is a Catholic church located in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala, about 10 kilometers away from Changanacherry; the Church is part of the Archdiocese of Changanacherry. It was established in 1927.

topPlaces.name: Mathumoola
topPlaces.description: Mathumoola is a part of Changanacherry Taluk in Kottayam District. It is a junction on National Highway 183 (MC Road).

topPlaces.name: Changanassery
topPlaces.description: Changanassery, (IPA: [t͡ʃɐŋːɐnaːʃeːɾi]) formerly Changanacherry, is a municipality in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 17 km (10.6 mi) south of the district headquarters in Kottayam and around 115 km (71.5 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Muttar
topPlaces.description: Muttar is a village in upper Kuttanad, Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. It is located 10 km west of Thiruvalla on the Kidangara Neerattupuram (Muttar Central) road, surrounded by Thalavady, Neerettupuram, Kunnamkary, Chathamkary & Mithrakary.

topPlaces.name: Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple
topPlaces.description: Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Perunna neighbourhood in Changanacherry. The deity of the temple is Subrahmanya Swami (Kartikeya), one of the three sons of Lord Shiva.

items.note: Vazhappally is a suburb of Changanasserry Municipality, Kottayam District, in central Kerala. The famous Vazhappally Shiva Temple is situated in Vazhappally.

The Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanacherry (Syriac: ܐܦܪܟܝܐ ܪܒܬܐ ܕܫܢܓܢܐܣܐܪܐ, romanized: Afarkaya Rabbta d-Shanganasara; Malayalam: ചങ്ങനാശ്ശേരി അതിരൂപത, romanized: Changanassery Atirūpata) is a Syro-Malabar Church archeparchy of the Catholic Church with an area of 24,595 km2 comprising the districts of Kottayam(excluding Vaikom), Alappuzha(excluding Cherthala), Pathanamthitta, Kollam, and Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, and also Kanyakumari district in Tamil Nadu. It is one of the largest Catholic dioceses in India in terms of area.

St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, also known as Valiyapally, is the cathedral of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanassery (Archieparchia Changanacherrensis) and also a Marian pilgrimage centre in Kerala, India.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Holy Family Syro-Malabar Church, Mannila & around

items.note: Holy Family Church Mannila is a Catholic church located in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala, about 10 kilometers away from Changanacherry; the Church is part of the Archdiocese of Changanacherry. It was established in 1927.
Mathumoola is a part of Changanacherry Taluk in Kottayam District. It is a junction on National Highway 183 (MC Road).

Changanassery, (IPA: [t͡ʃɐŋːɐnaːʃeːɾi]) formerly Changanacherry, is a municipality in the Kottayam district of Kerala, India. It is located 17 km (10.6 mi) south of the district headquarters in Kottayam and around 115 km (71.5 mi) north of the state capital Thiruvananthapuram.

Muttar is a village in upper Kuttanad, Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. It is located 10 km west of Thiruvalla on the Kidangara Neerattupuram (Muttar Central) road, surrounded by Thalavady, Neerettupuram, Kunnamkary, Chathamkary & Mithrakary.
Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Perunna neighbourhood in Changanacherry. The deity of the temple is Subrahmanya Swami (Kartikeya), one of the three sons of Lord Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (79 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vazhappally, Archeparchy of Changanacherry, St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, Changanassery, Holy Family Syro-Malabar Church, Mannila, Mathumoola.
